title: ThingsBoard Alarm
description: JSON Schema for ThingsBoard Alarm entity, derived from the public ThingsBoard OpenAPI 4.3.

originator.description: JSON object with alarm originator id

startTs.description: Timestamp of the alarm start time, in milliseconds

endTs.description: Timestamp of the alarm end time(last time update), in milliseconds

ackTs.description: Timestamp of the alarm acknowledgement, in milliseconds

clearTs.description: Timestamp of the alarm clearing, in milliseconds

assignTs.description: Timestamp of the alarm assignment, in milliseconds

propagate.description: Propagation flag to specify if alarm should be propagated to parent entities of alarm originator

propagateToOwner.description: Propagation flag to specify if alarm should be propagated to the owner (tenant or customer) of alarm originator

propagateToTenant.description: Propagation flag to specify if alarm should be propagated to the tenant entity

propagateRelationTypes.description: JSON array of relation types that should be used for propagation. By default, 'propagateRelationTypes' array is empty which means that the alarm will be propagated based on any relation type to parent entities. This parameter should be used only in case when 'propagate' parameter is set to true, otherwise, 'propagateRelationTypes' array will be ignored.

id.description: JSON object with the alarm Id. Specify this field to update the alarm. Referencing non-existing alarm Id will cause error. Omit this field to create new alarm.

createdTime.description: Timestamp of the alarm creation, in milliseconds
